projects.title: On-Demand Drone Security Patrol System for Bosques de las Lomas
projects.summary: Deploy a community-managed autonomous drone security system allowing residents to request aerial patrols via mobile app. Professional-grade GPS-guided drones with terrain mapping capabilities will provide rapid response security surveillance across Bosques de las Lomas streets and common areas, maintaining proper flight altitudes automatically. The system includes AFAC-compliant autonomous flight operations, secure data storage in Mexico, and integration with existing neighborhood security infrastructure. Residents can request drone dispatch to their location or follow suspicious activity, with all footage stored according to INAI privacy regulations and accessible to authorized community security coordinators.

milestones.title: Regulatory Compliance and Permits
milestones.description: Obtain AFAC autonomous drone operation permits, liability insurance, and SEDUVI approvals for GPS-guided drone operations over Bosques de las Lomas residential areas

milestones.title: Hardware and Mapping Infrastructure
milestones.description: Purchase GPS-guided autonomous drones with HD cameras and terrain mapping capabilities. Configure flight control systems with Bosques de las Lomas geographical data and establish charging stations

milestones.title: App Development and Data Infrastructure
milestones.description: Build resident-facing mobile app with integrated orientation tutorial for drone requests and secure Mexican data center infrastructure for INAI-compliant video storage and access controls

milestones.title: Community Integration and Launch
milestones.description: Train community security coordinators, install privacy signage throughout the colonia, and launch autonomous pilot operations with community testing

requiredRoles.description: Navigate autonomous drone registration and flight permits with Mexican aviation authorities for GPS-guided operations
Procure and configure GPS-guided drones with terrain mapping, autonomous flight controls, and security camera systems for residential surveillance

requiredRoles.role: Mobile App Developer with Tutorial Integration
requiredRoles.description: Build iOS/Android app with built-in orientation tutorial for drone dispatch requests, live video feeds, and resident authentication with bilingual interface
Ensure INAI compliance for video recording, establish data retention policies, and draft resident privacy agreements for autonomous drone surveillance
Train residents and security personnel on autonomous drone operations, establish dispatch protocols, and manage integration with existing neighborhood security systems
Oversee procurement compliance including 3-quote vendor selection, verify SAT status of contractors, and manage milestone-based payment disbursements

aiBlueprint.title: On-Demand Drone Security Patrol System for Bosques de las Lomas
aiBlueprint.summary: Deploy a community-managed autonomous drone security system allowing residents to request aerial patrols via mobile app. Professional-grade GPS-guided drones with terrain mapping capabilities will provide rapid response security surveillance across Bosques de las Lomas streets and common areas, maintaining proper flight altitudes automatically. The system includes AFAC-compliant autonomous flight operations, secure data storage in Mexico, and integration with existing neighborhood security infrastructure. Residents can request drone dispatch to their location or follow suspicious activity, with all footage stored according to INAI privacy regulations and accessible to authorized community security coordinators.
aiBlueprint.budgetJustification: Autonomous GPS-guided drone systems with terrain mapping cost significantly more than manual systems (~MXN 100,000-140,000 per unit). Advanced flight control software and mapping infrastructure add ~MXN 60,000. AFAC autonomous operation permits and insurance run ~MXN 40,000.

monitoringHints: Verify AFAC autonomous flight permit compliance through quarterly flight log reviews
Track GPS accuracy and terrain mapping effectiveness through flight path analysis
Monitor response times and resident satisfaction through app analytics and monthly community feedback
Audit data storage practices to ensure INAI compliance and Mexican data sovereignty
Review drone maintenance logs and autonomous system reliability to ensure operational readiness

projects.title: Paseo de las Palmas Lighting Upgrade
projects.summary: Replace 40 sodium streetlights with LED fixtures along Paseo de las Palmas.

milestones.title: Permits & Design
milestones.description: Obtain municipal permits and finalize LED specs.

milestones.title: Testing & Handoff
milestones.description: Commission and hand off to colonia.

services.name: Custom Software Development
services.description: Full-stack software development covering web applications, mobile apps, data analysis systems, and AI solutions. Handles complete project lifecycle from consultation and planning through development, testing, and deployment.
services.typicalPriceMxn: $50 USD per hour (~950 MXN/hr), flexible project-based pricing

chatMessages.content: Hi! I'll help you define a service for your provider profile. Let's start — what's the name of the service you'd like to register? A short, professional title works best (e.g., "LED Electrical Installation" or "Landscape Architecture").
i can program any type of project in every coding language. i have 5 years of experience as a data scienist and i charge 90,000 mexican pesos a month

Great! Let's refine this. For the service name, would you call it "Custom Software Development" or something more specific like "Data Science & Software Development"?

And when you say "any type of project" — what are the main types you typically work on? Web applications, mobile apps, data analysis systems, or something else?

Perfect! So "Custom Software Development" covers it all. 

Now, what does your typical process look like? Do you handle everything from initial consultation and planning through to final deployment, or do you focus on specific phases like development and testing?
Got it! So what exactly does a client receive when you complete a project? For example: working software, source code, documentation, training, ongoing support?
Excellent! Now about pricing — you mentioned 90,000 MXN per month. Is that for full-time project work, or do you also offer per-project rates for smaller jobs?
no, i want to charge 50 usd pero hour, and flexible to projects which involve an undefined ammount of time
Perfect! And finally, besides your 5 years as a data scientist, do you have any specific certifications, notable projects, or technologies you specialize in that you'd want to highlight?
i specialize in AI, I use all its tools with proefficiency as well as developing my own agents to help me work

Perfecto, I have everything I need. Ready to save this service?

Handles complete project lifecycle from consultation and planning through development, testing, and deployment.", "deliverables": ["Working software", "Source code", "Documentation", "Training", "Ongoing support"], "typicalPriceMxn": "$50 USD per hour (~950 MXN/hr), flexible project-based pricing", "highlights": "5 years data science experience, AI specialization with proficiency in all AI tools, develops custom AI agents for enhanced workflow efficiency"}}
